old_value: {"id":"smallhold-boju","title":"Strip in-process rate limiting, delegate to reverse proxy","description":"Deployment invariant: smallhold runs behind Caddy (or nginx/ALB). Strip LOGIN_ATTEMPTS HashMap and check_login_rate_limit() from api.rs (~30 lines). Strip rate limit check from webauthn.rs. Replace with ponytail comment: 'login rate limiting delegated to reverse proxy (Caddy rate_limit, nginx limit_req_zone)'. The in-memory HashMap doesn't survive restarts and is trivially bypassed by rotating IPs. Caddy's rate_limit directive is superior in every way. Reference: gaja commit 3cf3634.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"mark@wolfssl.com","created_at":"2026-07-19T22:39:07.339315567Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-19T22:39:07.339315567Z","labels":["ponytail","infra-delegation"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"smallhold-boju","depends_on_id":"smallhold-p1ls","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-19T23:04:17.058881382Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}

new_value: Rate limiting code stripped from api.rs and webauthn.rs
